name: Mushroom Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
1. For the Dough: Cream together the cream cheese and softened butter until well combined. Chill the mixture.
2. For the Filling: Sauté the onion and mushrooms in butter until soft. Add salt, thyme, flour, and cook until thickened. Stir in the sour cream.
3. Divide the dough into two halves and roll each half thinly. Cut into rounds and place a generous amount of mushroom filling on each round. Fold over to form a half-circle and seal the edges.
4. Freeze the turnovers at this point if desired.
5. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
6. Remove the desired quantity from the freezer. Pierce each turnover with a fork tip and brush with an egg yolk beaten with 1 teaspoon water.
7. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes until golden brown. Makes at least 4 dozen. You may have some mushroom mixture left over.
